meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills to Fix Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to eliminate debugging bottlenecks. A high-impact tutorial for freelancers to ship faster using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Debugging slows down delivery and drains your margins. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you gain an autonomous engineering partner that analyzes stack traces, refactors legacy logic, and writes unit tests in real-time. This setup transforms your workflow from manual hunting to automated resolution, letting you ship production-ready code faster.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red error messages. You’ve been staring at the same stack trace for two hours, and the deadline feels like a closing vice. It’s the classic freelancer’s trap: spending more time troubleshooting than building features that actually pay the bills.

But what if you could outsource the grunt work of debugging to a system that understands your entire codebase context? Claude Code, paired with the structural power of Antigravity, isn't just a tool; it's a force multiplier that turns your debugging sessions into rapid-fire execution cycles.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a secure, context-aware bridge between your local repository and the Claude Code agent to ensure it understands your file structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the project structure, identify the primary entry point, and map the dependency graph to prepare for autonomous debugging.

steps.title: Context Loading for Debugging
steps.description: Feed the specific error log into the agent so it can correlate the failure with the relevant code blocks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Ingest the following error log and correlate it with the offending module to identify the root cause of the exception.

steps.title: Autonomous Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Let the AI perform a deep dive into the code to propose a fix without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a recursive trace analysis on the identified module. Propose a refactor that handles the null pointer gracefully while maintaining existing business logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Analyze the root cause of the current error and suggest a patch."

steps.title: Automated Test Suite Generation
steps.description: Before applying the fix, generate regression tests to ensure the solution doesn't break existing features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest test suite that covers the edge case causing the bug and verify current functionality remains intact.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Write and execute unit tests for the current module to prevent regressions."

steps.title: Final Implementation and Commit
steps.description: Apply the validated fix and generate a professional commit message for your client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply the validated fix, run the test suite again, and write a concise technical commit message explaining the resolution.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message "Fix: Resolve critical exception in auth module"

pro_tips: Always use --read-only mode when exploring legacy codebases to ensure you don't accidentally modify production configs.
Alias your most common Claude Code commands in your .zshrc to save 10+ minutes of typing daily.
Use Antigravity to generate 'TODO' documentation automatically as you fix bugs to impress clients with your project hygiene.
Pipe your error logs directly into Claude Code using standard shell redirection to avoid copy-pasting.
Request 'Chain of Thought' reasoning from Claude Code to learn from its debugging logic and improve your own coding patterns.
content.next_steps: After mastering these debugging workflows, start creating custom 'Agent Personas' within your Claude Code config to tailor the AI's coding style to your specific client requirements.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start scaling your freelance business with elite AI workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
